emails.subject: Dynegy Power Marketing
emails.body: Dynegy Power Marketing Hi Tana, I noticed that the trades that we need to assign from Dynegy Power Marketing to Dynegy Marketing and Trade were all November trades. The settlements group will be doing their download tonight for November business. Do you think I can change these trades to the correct name today or should I wait until the assignment is fully signed. Thanks, Melissa 3-1886
